reviews.comment:
Son geniales
Muy competentes buena atención siempre agradables y muy educados y respetuosos
Yo hice todo en 15 minutos: cargue Marte cambiaron lamparita líquido refrigerante y limpia vidrios

(Translated by Google)
They're great!
Very competent, excellent service, always pleasant, and very polite and respectful.
I got everything done in 15 minutes: charged my car, they changed the light bulb, coolant, and windshield washer fluid.

reviews.comment:
Desastrosa estación, estuve 35min de espera para cargar y con solo 8 autos delante. Siempre con surtidores cerrados y poco personal. Decadente sinceramente

(Translated by Google)
This station is a disaster. I waited 35 minutes to fill up, and there were only eight cars ahead of me. Pumps were always closed, and there were hardly any staff. It's truly awful.

reviews.comment:
Terriblemente lentos para cargar combustible. Y si llegas a la hora del cambio de turno hay UNO solo atendiendo por más de una hora. Podrían tener solo 2 surtidores tranquilamente, sería exactamente igual

(Translated by Google)
Terribly slow to pump fuel. And if you arrive during shift change, there's only ONE person working for over an hour. They could easily have just 2 pumps; it would be exactly the same.

Y si en cambio de turno existen demoras y la demanda es mucha además brindamos servicios para atender al cliente como corresponde 
Hay otras estacionnes que son sin servicios y solo carga 
Nosotros cumplimos con el ciclo de servicios gracias
